Package neqsim.process.operations

Class OperationalAction

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.OperationalAction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class OperationalAction extends Object implements Serializable
Describes one plant-agnostic operation to apply to a NeqSim process model.

Actions are intentionally small and map to existing NeqSim capabilities: automation writes, valve-opening logic actions, steady-state runs, field-input application, and transient steps.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • OperationalAction

      private OperationalAction(OperationalAction.ActionType type, String target, double value, String unit, double durationSeconds, double timeStepSeconds, String description)
      Creates an action.
      Parameters:
      type - action type
      target - action target such as an automation address or valve name
      value - action value
      unit - engineering unit for the value
      durationSeconds - transient duration in seconds
      timeStepSeconds - transient time step in seconds
      description - human-readable description

  • Method Details

    • setVariable

      public static OperationalAction setVariable(String address, double value, String unit)
      Creates an action that writes an automation variable.
      Parameters:
      address - automation address
      value - value to set
      unit - engineering unit
      Returns:
      operational action

    • setValveOpening

      public static OperationalAction setValveOpening(String valveName, double percentOpen)
      Creates an action that sets a throttling valve opening percentage.
      Parameters:
      valveName - valve unit name
      percentOpen - target opening in percent from 0 to 100
      Returns:
      operational action

    • applyFieldInputs

      public static OperationalAction applyFieldInputs()
      Creates an action that applies field input devices to the model.
      Returns:
      operational action

    • runSteadyState

      public static OperationalAction runSteadyState()
      Creates an action that runs a steady-state calculation.
      Returns:
      operational action

    • runTransient

      public static OperationalAction runTransient(double durationSeconds, double timeStepSeconds)
      Creates an action that runs transient process steps.
      Parameters:
      durationSeconds - total duration in seconds
      timeStepSeconds - time step in seconds
      Returns:
      operational action

      Returns the action type.

      public String getTarget()
      Returns the action target.

    • getValue

      public double getValue()
      Returns the action value.
      Returns:
      value, or NaN for actions that do not use one

    • getUnit

      public String getUnit()
      Returns the value unit.
      Returns:
      unit string or empty string

      Returns the transient duration.

      duration in seconds

      Returns the transient time step.

      time step in seconds

      Returns the action description.
      Returns:

    • clean

      private static String clean(String text)
      Cleans nullable text to a trimmed non-null value.
      Parameters:
      text - text to clean
      Returns:
      trimmed text or empty string
